title: Oh The Biomes We've Gone
description: An astounding sequel to the original BYG mod for 1.20.1+ with over 50+ biomes ranging from the magical to the realistic and all breathtaking!
body:
[![BisectCode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05fa57cc9db2f07c33bc6ba35636d38bf68ff757_0.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/aocawol) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_945056aa-921e-44e4-85dd-f45231940861.png)                  [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4bce6dd3-7af5-4014-a705-04cd0c0adb87.png)](https://www.patreon.com/potionstudios)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_2e3d72d9-91b0-4d00-8eef-26be28254a6c.png)](https://discord.gg/zQA4eez2eS)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_84597b2e-8453-472a-9043-329d8218ac75.png)](https://x.com/_AOCAWOL)   **_"You have brains in your head. You have feet in your shoes. You can steer yourself in any direction you choose._ _You're on your own. And you know what you know. And YOU are the one who'll decide where to go"_** **_\-Dr. Seuss, Oh, The Places You'll Go!_**   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1070751/description_a1820aba-6e98-496b-954b-53c078297080.png)**

[**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1070751/description_f80168f8-5c01-42cf-a924-b36e91cafca5.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfinder)

[**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1070751/description_7acdccbe-8e6f-49f6-bde2-ee820d4370a9.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-descent)

** **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1070751/description_10da38ee-7e1c-4d1d-9bf5-d07267b232ad.png)** **Oh The Biomes We've Gone is the sequel to the timeless Oh The Biomes You'll Go mod for 1.20.1+ with over 50 breathtaking magical and realistic biomes. BWG will take you on an adventure by adding diverse and detailed life to Minecraft. BWG also adds new unique mobs, structures, and hundreds of blocks to utilize.** **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_43d7961e-7fe6-4cab-9073-f96e1a05c5bf.png)**
